description: Navigate Firefox to file:///home/ga/Documents/landing_page/index.html. Open Web Developer Tools and activate Responsive Design Mode. Configure the viewport for a Mobile device (Width: 375px, Height: 812px, DPR: 1.0) and capture a screenshot of the visible viewport using Firefox's built-in tool. Save it as ~/Documents/QA_Screenshots/mobile_viewport.png. Then configure the viewport for a Tablet device (Width: 768px, Height: 1024px, DPR: 1.0) and capture another screenshot of the visible viewport, saving it as ~/Documents/QA_Screenshots/tablet_viewport.png.
